$comment: Copy to a gitignored file and point E2E_PROFILE at it:
Every field can also be supplied as an environment variable (E2E_BASE_URL,
E2E_ADMIN_PASSWORD, E2E_LLM_API_KEY, …) so CI can inject secrets without a file.
This suite runs against a DEPLOYED control plane and creates real data on it.

llm.$comment: An endpoint the target can reach, plus every agent core to exercise — the live-agent specs run once per entry, so this sets the matrix width.

capabilities.$comment: Match these to the deployment under test; a capability turned off skips its specs rather than failing them.
